# Redistributed dependency notices

These files accompany binary dependencies included in the Windows packages.
They do not change the license of `lw.PPOCR.Inference` itself.

| Component | Files in this directory | Canonical terms |
|---|---|---|
| OpenCV 5.0.0 | `opencv-APACHE-2.0.txt` | Apache License 2.0 |
| ONNX Runtime 1.23.0 | `onnxruntime-MIT.txt`, `onnxruntime-ThirdPartyNotices.txt` | MIT |
| DirectML 1.15.4 | `DirectML-MIT.txt` | <https://github.com/microsoft/DirectML/blob/master/LICENSE> |
| OpenVINO 2026.2.0 | `openvino-APACHE-2.0.txt`, `openvino-EULA.txt` | Apache License 2.0 and packaged notices |
| TensorRT 10.16.1.11 | `TensorRT-License-Reference.txt`, `TensorRT-ThirdPartyNotices.txt` | <https://docs.nvidia.com/deeplearning/tensorrt/latest/reference/sla.html> |
| CUDA Runtime 12.6 | `CUDA-EULA.txt` | NVIDIA CUDA Toolkit EULA |
| PP-OCR model artifacts | `PaddleOCR-models-APACHE-2.0.txt` | Apache License 2.0 |
| cpp-httplib 0.49.0 | `cpp-httplib-MIT.txt` | MIT |
| nlohmann/json 3.12.0 | `nlohmann-json-MIT.txt` | MIT |

The TensorRT distribution supplied by NVIDIA contains a license-reference
document rather than a standalone copy of the online agreement. Both that
upstream reference and its third-party acknowledgements are preserved here.
Use and redistribution of TensorRT and CUDA components remain subject to the
applicable NVIDIA agreements.
